pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates users mholloway (line 46) and clille (line 47); NOTE_CONTENT (line 55) explicitly lists them for termination; export_result.sh (lines 14-15) checks they should not exist; verifier.py (lines 58-69) expects deletion

setup_task.sh creates user sdhawan (line 48); NOTE_CONTENT explicitly states 'Sitara Dhawan (username: sdhawan) has extended her contract. Do NOT remove her access yet.'; export_result.sh (line 16) checks this user should exist; verifier.py (lines 72-74) expects sdhawan_exists=true
task_utils.sh defines NUXEO_ADMIN='Administrator' (line 7); export_result.sh checks 'Administrator' should exist (line 34); verifier.py validates this account must not be deleted (line 46)

setup_task.sh line 54 defines NOTE_NAME='Access-Termination-Request'; line 58 constructs API path as '/path/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/$NOTE_NAME'; nuxeo_api calls use this path (lines 75, 89)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves a synthetic Nuxeo Platform environment with three fictional employees: Marcus Holloway (mholloway) and Clara Lille (clille) who are scheduled for account deletion due to contract completion and resignation respectively, and Sitara Dhawan (sdhawan) whose access must be retained due to contract extension. An 'Access Termination Request' note with the subject 'Offboarding List - Oct 2023' is posted in the Projects workspace to communicate these decisions. The Administrator account must be preserved as a system sanity check.
